sentences.arabic: يَذْهَبُ الأَبُ إِلَى السُّوقِ كُلَّ أُسْبُوعٍ.
sentences.translation: Otac ide na pijacu svake sedmice.
sentences.translationEn: The father goes to the market every week.
He buys fresh vegetables and fruits.

sentences.arabic: يَتَحَدَّثُ مَعَ البَائِعِينَ وَيُسَاوِمُ عَلَى السِّعْرِ.
sentences.translation: Razgovara s prodavcima i cjenka se.
sentences.translationEn: He talks to the sellers and negotiates the price.

sentences.translation: Pijaca je gužvavo i aktivno mjesto.
sentences.translationEn: The market is a busy and lively place.

sentences.translation: Vraća se kući s puno stvari.
sentences.translationEn: He returns home with many things.
